## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content refresh progress, and early results.](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Early results show 10% impression growth from content refreshes, but slight traffic decline (3%) needing further investigation](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Content refresh workflow improvements ongoing; 300 pieces refreshed in 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [New interlinking and categorization strategies discussed to improve site structure and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Exploring AI-powered tools (Profound, Scrunch) for monitoring citations and LLM presence](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Progress and Challenges

  - [300 pieces refreshed in 3 weeks, significantly outpacing industry norms](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Workflow improvements ongoing to address table rendering and formatting issues](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Manual review and publishing still required, but expected to improve in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Batch 2 ready, Batch 3 in preparation](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

### Early SEO Results Analysis

  - [10% impression growth observed, indicating new keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [3% traffic decline, not overly concerning but being investigated](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Some pages not yet re-crawled by Google, full impact not yet visible](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [AI overview snippets potentially impacting click-through rates on some queries](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Interlinking and Site Structure Improvements

  - [Current structure limits internal linking (only 20 links per category page)](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Suggested creating multiple category levels and featured sections](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Aim to have most content within two clicks, improving crawlability](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [Example shared of helpline.org's topic hub structure for better interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)

### AI and LLM Strategy

  - [Experimenting with Reddit posts to influence AI tool responses](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Airbyte now ranking first in terms of citations shared, surpassing competitors](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Exploring use of Profound and Scrunch tools for monitoring LLM presence and citations](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

### Content Prioritization

  - [Focus on completing data engineering resources category](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - ["How to sync" category identified as next priority (7,000+ pages)](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Considering AI-assisted categorization for efficient content organization](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to investigate specific URLs with traffic drops and share findings](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Tanmay to provide Bing Search Console access to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Marcel to send a list of 10-ish pages for footer inclusion and manual interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [GrowthX team to gain access to Airbyte's Profound instance for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Tanmay to focus on improving site categorization and interlinking structure](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [Continue with content refresh workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Explore AI-assisted categorization for efficient content organization](https://fathom.video/share/RGoh8zizCJ6XmxByNh9B318hEyT46x16?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
